sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif fonctionnel + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-style comprehension). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ A1 (Hachette), Dossier 2 'Ici, ailleurs' (la ville, il y a, articles définis/indéfinis, prépositions de lieu). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
